title: Kenyan Soothing Nut Cake
description: A delicious and comforting cake made with Kenyan spices and soothing ingredients, perfect for a relaxing snack or dessert.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together softened butter, eggs, and Kenyan spice blend.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
